name: Wanjia Asset Management Co.Ltd. - Wanjia Star Market 2 year Regular Open Hybrid Fund
summary: Wanjia Asset Management Co.Ltd. - Wanjia Star Market 2 year Regular Open Hybrid Fund is a hybrid fund that invests in the Star Market of the Shanghai Stock Exchange. It has a 2-year holding period and is open for regular subscriptions and redemptions. The fund is managed by Wanjia Asset Management and is based in China.
